5 Sept 2014

Be the first of your friends to get a 3D selfie

05 Sep 2014

Your family and friends are sure to be impressed when you show them your selfie in 3D. This fall Artec is offering you a chance to make one at Euromold, a leading global fair for moldmaking and tooling, design and application development, in Frankfurt am Main.

Come by our stand to check out Shapify, a rotating booth that will 3D scan your body within just a few seconds. You can then check out your digital 3D model, and if you like it, order it to be printed out in 3D and delivered to your door a few days later.

Also, together with our partner, Antonius Koester, we will be exhibiting Artec’s portable high-quality 3D scanners Spider and Eva, which are used to scan smaller objects.

When: November 25-28

Where: Stand E-05, Hall 11, Messe Frankfurt Venue, Ludwig-Erhard-Anlage 1, 60327, Frankfurt am Main, Germany
